raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch eezels weenu
karroqu ſtary teem Paganeem
io tahſenes / un peelabbinaſhs
ohs no Semmes Galla. Un
augi/ ahtri un tikkuſchi tee at-
anhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Starpâ ne buhs pahri preekſch winna/ itweenan
veekuſis nedâ wahjſch/ neweens
naudihâ nedâ gullehs/ nedâ win-
ko Gurnu Johſta tapâ atraiſita/
nedâ winna Kurpjn-Sikfne tape
arauſtita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Bultas irr af-
as/ un wiſſi winna Stohpi us-
wilkti/ winna Sirgu Naggi tik
eeti buhs ka Akmins/ un winna
Skritteti ka Wefuls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winna Ruhſchana buhe
breeſimigain Lauwam lihdsa/ un
tee ruhês ka tee janni Lauwas/
un tee kanks un notwers to Lau-
pijunu / un aisweddihs ka ne-
lahds Iſpeſtitajs buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee * prett winneem
tai Deenâ kanks/ itt ka Juhra
kanz/ tad taps ta Semine us-
lubkota / bet rangi/ tad buhs
Tumsiba/ Behdas/ ir patti
Gatsma taps aptumſchota eekſch
winnas poſſtitahm Weetahm.
* Tee Pagami prett teem Judeem,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Anui Gadda/ kad tas
Rehninsch Usſius nomir-
re / tad redſeju es to
KUNgu febscham ns weenu aug-
stu un uzſeltu Godhibas Krehs-
lu/ un winna (Drehbin) Wiꞥ-
le peepildja to Deewa Naminu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee Serawim ſtabweja
pahri preekſch winna/ itweenan
bij ſechti Spahrni/ ar diweem
apſedſe (itweens) tawu Wat-
gu/ un ar diweem apſedſe wiꞥſch
kawas Rahjas/ un ar diweem
kreſhje wiꞥſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weens fanze us ohtru/
un ſazzija: Swehts/ Swehts/
Swehts irr tas KUNGS Ze-
baot/ wiſſa Senume irr pilna
winna Godhibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tâ ka tee Palodi to Sten-
dern kuſtinajahs no to Sauzeju
Baltim / un tas Nams tappe
pils Duhnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ſazziju es: Waj man!
jo man ja-eet bohjâ/ ka es weens
Wihrs ar nefchkihſtahm Luh-
pahm efmu / un dſihwoju starp
Laudim/ kam nefchkihſtas Luh-
pah pas irr. Jo mannas Aziz irr
te Rehninu to KUNGu Zebaot
redſejſchas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atſkreſhje weens no
teem Serawim pee mannim/ un
winna Rohka bija deggoti Ohg-
le/ ko wiꞥſch ar to Stangu bij
no ta Altara rehinis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch atſkahre ar to
mannu Mutti/ un ſazzija: Rau-
gi/ fcht irr taiwas Luhpas ais-
kahruſi/ ta irr taiws Noseeguins
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
